blog_title: Single Head vs Double Head Embroidery Machine — ₹40K Loss on 1000 Piece Order Exposed
caption:
₹40,000 lost on a single 1000-piece embroidery order. 😬

A printer chose single-head over double-head. 4-5 mins per piece = 80 hours of work. 10 days. Client penalized ₹40k for delays. Plus 50-60 pieces had loose threads from exhausted workers.

Double-head costs more upfront but pays for itself in 3-4 big orders.

Save this if you're bidding on bulk embroidery next month 👇
